div.style: max-width: 800px; margin: 40px auto;
background: var(--white); border: 1px solid var(--border); overflow: hidden;
background: var(--navy); padding: 32px 40px; color: var(--white); display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: flex-start;
font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: -0.5px;

div.p:
Jl. Telekomunikasi No. 1, Bandung
Jawa Barat, Indonesia

div.style: text-align: right;
font-size: .75rem; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 1px; color: var(--gold);
font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 700;
font-size: .875rem; color: rgba(255,255,255,0.7); margin-top: 4px;
padding: 40px;
display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; padding-bottom: 24px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); margin-bottom: 24px;
font-size: .75rem; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--text-muted); margin-bottom: 4px;
text-align: right;
font-size: .75rem; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--text-muted); margin-bottom: 4px;
font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 800; color: var(--navy);
margin-bottom: 32px;

h5.style: font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--navy); margin-bottom: 12px; border-left: 4px solid var(--gold); padding-left: 8px;

div.style: background: var(--bg); padding: 16px; border-radius: var(--radius); border: 1px solid var(--border);
font-weight: 700; font-size: 1.1rem; color: var(--text); margin-bottom: 8px;
display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 12px; font-size: .875rem; color: var(--text-muted);
grid-column: 1 / -1;
margin-bottom: 32px;

h5.style: font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 700; color: var(--navy); margin-bottom: 12px; border-left: 4px solid var(--gold); padding-left: 8px;

div.style: background: var(--white); padding: 16px; border-radius: var(--radius); border: 1px solid var(--border);
font-weight: 600; color: var(--text); margin-bottom: 12px; padding-bottom: 8px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
font-size: .875rem; color: var(--text); white-space: pre-wrap; line-height: 1.8;
background: var(--amber-bg); border: 1px solid var(--amber); border-radius: var(--radius); padding: 20px;
div.p:
Silakan transfer tepat sebesar ke rekening berikut untuk memproses pesanan Anda:
BCA 1234567890 a.n. PT Tripma Sign
